MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Vassillike Vorrises, is present.
Attorney,Michael Hall, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Jerry Lints, is present.
Attorney, Megan Thompson, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-15-2010 is vacated.
